items.claim: Nurulo Aliev is an outstanding chain wrestler with good top control, excellent cardio, and good defensive discipline.
items.quote: Nulo, um, outstanding chain wrestler, uh, good top control, excellent cardio, and definitely discipline uh, defensively.

items.claim: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, good speed, power, dangerous kicks, and high athleticism.
items.quote: Mike Davis has excellent boxing skills, uh, pretty fast, pretty powerful, dangerous kicks, and definitely athletic.

items.claim: Magomed Tuchalov likes to strike, keep the fight standing, and put pressure on his opponent.
items.quote: he's going to just come in here and uh pretty much knock out Robero... likes to strike and um likes to keep the fight a stand and bang and puts pressure into his opponent.

items.claim: Brandon Romero is a poor fighter overall in the UFC.
items.quote: Roberio's, you know, being just overall trash fighter in uh in the UFC.
